tools.description: Search local openclaw-mem observations and return compact cited matches.
tools.name: mem_search

tools.description: Return recent local openclaw-mem observations in timestamp order.
tools.name: mem_timeline

tools.description: Get one local openclaw-mem observation by record reference or numeric id.
tools.name: mem_get

tools.description: Build a bounded ContextPack v1 with citations for an agent query.
tools.name: mem_pack

tools.description: Store one local observation without requiring embedding availability.
tools.name: mem_store

tools.description: Return local openclaw-mem store health, counts, and latency receipt.
tools.name: mem_status

tools.description: Inspect trust metadata for one local observation and explain pack eligibility hints.
tools.name: mem_trust_inspect
